_comment: Per-lanelet time penalty (s). Added on top of attribute penalties. Negative = bonus (reward). Total cost = length/speed + attr_penalty + lanelet_penalty (clamped to >= 0).
_stop_plus_crosswalk: Lanelet 105 has both STOP and CROSSWALK (3 + 1).
_stop_plus_zoneG: Lanelets 748 and 838 are STOP signs that also belong to zone G (3 + 5).
_crosswalks: CROSSWALK only (~1s slowdown to check for pedestrians).
_zone_G_traffic_light_intersection: Lanelets entering/exiting/crossing zone G (5s avg red-light wait).
_highway_bonus: Highway lanelets — reward higher speed via negative penalty.
